reviews.comment:
Los playeros bien, atentos, los combustibles mas barato que sus pares ya que es mas barato que el acá de ingeniero maschwitz por ejemplo. Tiene un amplió espacio de atención con varias dársena de carga y rápida entrada y salida, el problema esta en la salida que quedas en la colectora sin posibilidades de retomar a la panamericana sin peaje que termina en san Isidro por lo demás bien

(Translated by Google)
The attendants were good and attentive, and the fuel was cheaper than at other stations, even cheaper than the one in Ingeniero Maschwitz, for example. It has a large service area with several fueling bays and quick entry and exit. The problem is the exit; you're left on the service road with no way to get back onto the toll-free Pan-American Highway, which ends in San Isidro. Otherwise, it's fine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBazRiS1VREAE
